displayTitle: Dark Times #3: The Path to Nowhere
synopsis: Events have led the Jedi Dass Jennir and his companion Bomo Greenbark to the planet Orvax, a slave marketplace to the galaxy. There they face danger not only from the slavers and the Empire, but must confront the awful truth that their goal may lie beyond their reach. Meanwhile, Darth Vader must deal with unpleasant realities, and memories, of his own; though he is a Dark Lord of the Sith, even he must bow before the power of the Emperor.
title: Dark Times #3: The Path to Nowhere
